principles: [DOC] Restrict each API key with one application restriction and one or more API restrictions.
[DOC] Use separate API keys for each app to reduce blast radius.
[DOC] Split client-side and server-side usage into separate projects or keys when platform types differ.
[DOC] Check API key usage and unexpected credential_id traffic before restricting, rotating, or deleting keys.

notes: [DOC] Website restrictions are the expected application restriction for JavaScript platform traffic.
[DOC] Maps JavaScript API should be authorized when the app uses the Maps JavaScript API.
[DOC] Server-side web service calls should not share the browser key.
[DOC] IP restrictions are the expected fallback for web service platform traffic.
